composer: Hirokazu Tanaka, Ryoji Yoshitomi, Kazumi Totaka

audio_identity.overall_style: Mario-themed art creation tool with accessible sound design
distinctive_elements: Music composer with 15 instrument samples using Mario/game icons
Melodic instruments: piano (Mario head), bell (Power Star), trumpet (Fire Flower), pulse wave (Game Boy), horn section (goose), guitar (airliner), organ (car)
Percussion: bass drum (Super Mushroom), woodblock (ship), bass pluck (heart)
Sound effects: Yoshi zip, dog bark, cat meow, pig oink, baby hiccup
Restricted to C major/A minor scale (no sharps or flats)
Common time or triple time signatures
Easter egg: baby laugh sample that when reversed and slowed reveals 'Nintendo!'
Data overflow error with looping explosion sound effect
influences: Super Mario World sprites and sound effects
